instruction: Generate an easy riddle where the answer is CLOCK
output: I have hands but cannot clap. I have a face but cannot smile. I keep count of every second of your life. What am I?

instruction: Generate an easy riddle where the answer is MIRROR
output: I show your face without a camera. I reflect the world in silence. Stand before me and see yourself as others do. What am I?

instruction: Generate an easy riddle where the answer is BOOK
output: I hold thousands of words but never speak aloud. Open my covers to travel to places you have never been. I am a world made of pages. What am I?

instruction: Generate an easy riddle where the answer is UMBRELLA
output: I stand between you and the sky when the sky is crying. I open like a flower but only bloom in rain. Fold me away when the sun returns. What am I?

instruction: Generate an easy riddle where the answer is STAIRS
output: I go up and down but never move from my place. I help you reach higher ground without wings. Take me one step at a time. What am I?

instruction: Generate an easy riddle where the answer is CANDLE
output: I give light but slowly consume myself to do it. Blow on me and I vanish instantly. My tiny glow keeps the darkness at bay. What am I?

instruction: Generate an easy riddle where the answer is ENVELOPE
output: I carry words from one heart to another. Seal me shut before you send me on my way. I open with anticipation and a torn edge. What am I?

instruction: Generate an easy riddle where the answer is GLOVES
output: I cover your hands but have no fingers of my own. I keep your grip warm on the coldest days. Pull me off when you come inside. What am I?

instruction: Generate an easy riddle where the answer is COIN
output: I have two sides but I am a single thing. Flip me and let fate decide between heads and tails. I am round, flat, and spend my life in pockets. What am I?

instruction: Generate an easy riddle where the answer is KEYBOARD
output: I have many keys but open no doors. Press my letters and words appear on a screen. I live on desks and feed hungry computers. What am I?

instruction: Generate an easy riddle where the answer is SHADOW
output: I follow you faithfully in the sunlight but vanish at night. I share your exact shape but have no body of my own. I copy your every move without permission. What am I?

instruction: Generate an easy riddle where the answer is FIRE
output: I eat wood and breathe out smoke. I warm the cold but can devour a forest. Dance near me but never touch me. What am I?

instruction: Generate an easy riddle where the answer is THUNDER
output: I follow my bright sibling across the stormy sky. I am heard but never touched. I rumble and roll when clouds collide overhead. What am I?

instruction: Generate an easy riddle where the answer is RIVER
output: I flow endlessly but never leave my bed. I carve canyons through patience and time. I carry ships but own no vessel myself. What am I?

instruction: Generate an easy riddle where the answer is NEWSPAPER
output: I am full of news but cannot speak a single word. Every morning I am born fresh and every evening I am old. Fold me up and recycle me tomorrow. What am I?

instruction: Generate an easy riddle where the answer is BRIDGE
output: I connect two sides across the gap that divides them. I stand above water without ever getting wet. Millions of feet cross over me every day. What am I?

instruction: Generate an easy riddle where the answer is CAMERA
output: I capture moments and freeze them forever in a frame. I have a single eye that blinks to remember everything. Smile and I will hold that moment for decades. What am I?

instruction: Generate an easy riddle where the answer is TELEPHONE
output: I carry voices across great distances in an instant. Pick me up and say hello to someone far away. I ring loudly when someone wants to reach you. What am I?

instruction: Generate an easy riddle where the answer is LADDER
output: I have rungs but I am not a barrel or a fence. I help you climb higher without needing wings. Lean me against a wall and step up carefully. What am I?

instruction: Generate an easy riddle where the answer is GHOST
output: I am said to haunt old houses in the dead of night. I have no solid body yet many claim to have seen me. I drift through walls and vanish at dawn. What am I?

instruction: Generate an easy riddle where the answer is FLAME
output: I dance in the wind and flicker when you breathe on me. I am born from a single spark and die with a drop of water. Tiny but mighty, I push back the dark. What am I?

instruction: Generate an easy riddle where the answer is CLOUD
output: I drift across the sky without any wings to carry me. I carry rain hidden inside my white and grey form. Sometimes I look like animals, castles, or faces. What am I?

instruction: Generate an easy riddle where the answer is SOCK
output: I cover your foot and always come in pairs. Lose one of me and my partner is left alone forever. I hide inside your shoe all day long. What am I?

instruction: Generate an easy riddle where the answer is WINDOW
output: I let the outside world in without actually letting it in. I am made of glass set into a frame. Look through me to see everything beyond your walls. What am I?

instruction: Generate an easy riddle where the answer is DOOR
output: I stand between outside and inside at every entrance. Knock on me and someone may answer from the other side. Open me to enter and close me for privacy. What am I?

instruction: Generate an easy riddle where the answer is PENCIL
output: I write stories but I shrink a little every time I do. Sharpen me when my point grows dull and flat. I leave gray marks on white paper that you can erase. What am I?

instruction: Generate an easy riddle where the answer is GLASSES
output: I sit on your nose and help you see the world clearly. Two lenses in a frame correct your blurry vision. Without me, some people cannot read a single word. What am I?

instruction: Generate an easy riddle where the answer is WALLET
output: I hold your money but I never spend a single coin myself. I live in your pocket or purse day and night. Lose me and you lose your cards and your identity. What am I?

instruction: Generate an easy riddle where the answer is PILLOW
output: I cradle your head every single night with softness. I am fluffy and welcoming when your tired face arrives. I live on your bed and wait for you patiently. What am I?

instruction: Generate an easy riddle where the answer is BLANKET
output: I wrap around you when the night grows cold and dark. I am comfort and warmth stitched into fabric form. Tuck yourself beneath me and let sleep find you. What am I?

instruction: Generate an easy riddle where the answer is BUTTON
output: I hold two pieces of fabric neatly together. I am small and round but surprisingly important. Pop me loose and things start to fall apart. What am I?

instruction: Generate an easy riddle where the answer is ZIPPER
output: I have teeth but I never bite anything at all. Pull my tiny tab and I open or close in a line. I keep your jacket sealed against the winter wind. What am I?

instruction: Generate an easy riddle where the answer is STAMP
output: I am small and sticky and cling to envelopes. I am a tiny ticket that lets letters travel the world. Lick me and press me down to send your message. What am I?

instruction: Generate an easy riddle where the answer is KITE
output: I fly in the sky but I am attached to a string below. The wind is the only engine I ever need. Pull me back down and wait for the next breezy day. What am I?

instruction: Generate an easy riddle where the answer is LANTERN
output: I hold a flame safely inside my glass walls. I light the path for travelers when electricity fails. Carry me through the darkness and follow my warm glow. What am I?

instruction: Generate an easy riddle where the answer is WHISTLE
output: Blow through me and a sharp clear sound cuts the air. Referees use me to stop the game with one breath. I am tiny but everyone in the stadium hears me. What am I?

instruction: Generate an easy riddle where the answer is MAGNET
output: I attract some things and push others away. I stick to fridges and hold your notes in place. My invisible force acts through the air without touching. What am I?

instruction: Generate an easy riddle where the answer is PUPPET
output: I dance and move but I have no bones of my own. Someone above me controls my every gesture and step. I perform on stage but I am never truly alive. What am I?

instruction: Generate an easy riddle where the answer is BANANA
output: I am bright yellow on the outside and soft white within. I grow in tropical bunches high on a leafy plant. Peel back my skin before you take a bite. What am I?

instruction: Generate an easy riddle where the answer is RIDDLE
output: I am a question that hides its answer in plain sight. I tease your mind and then reward your patience with a smile. You are solving me right now. What am I?

instruction: Generate a medium riddle where the answer is COMPASS
output: I always point north but I cannot take you there myself. I spin in circles just to find direction. Sailors trust me with their lives on open seas. What am I?

instruction: Generate a medium riddle where the answer is DREAM
output: I visit you every night without an invitation or a knock. I can feel vivid and real but vanish by morning light. I am a world your sleeping mind builds for itself. What am I?

instruction: Generate a medium riddle where the answer is PASSWORD
output: I am a secret that is used to protect other secrets. Too simple and I am easily broken; too complex and I am forgotten. Without me you cannot enter the place I guard. What am I?

instruction: Generate a medium riddle where the answer is NEEDLE
output: I am thin as a whisper and sharp as a broken promise. I carry thread through layers of fabric to make things whole again. I have an eye but I have never once seen anything. What am I?

instruction: Generate a medium riddle where the answer is SMOKE
output: I rise from fire but I am not the fire itself. I cloud your vision and sting your eyes with quiet cruelty. I am the pale ghost of everything that has burned away. What am I?

instruction: Generate a medium riddle where the answer is ANCHOR
output: I plunge into the deep to hold still what would otherwise drift. I am heavy with purpose and cold from the ocean floor. Without me, every ship would wander without rest. What am I?

instruction: Generate a medium riddle where the answer is TELESCOPE
output: I bring the distant stars close enough to dream about touching them. I make the unimaginably far feel almost near. Point me at the night sky and see infinity staring back. What am I?

instruction: Generate a medium riddle where the answer is HOURGLASS
output: I measure time not with hands but with falling grains. My life is a slow trickle from the top chamber to the bottom. Flip me over and time begins its quiet journey once more. What am I?

instruction: Generate a medium riddle where the answer is LIGHTHOUSE
output: I stand tall and unmoving when the storms rage around me. My beam of light sweeps the dark waters in slow circles. I am a beacon that guides the lost and never sleeps. What am I?

instruction: Generate a medium riddle where the answer is FOSSIL
output: I am the memory of a creature that has been gone for ages. Buried inside stone for millions of years, I tell ancient stories. Dig carefully and I will reveal secrets from before history began. What am I?

instruction: Generate a medium riddle where the answer is FINGERPRINT
output: I am unique to every single person who has ever lived. I leave my signature everywhere my owner touches. Scientists read me to solve crimes and identify the unknown. What am I?

instruction: Generate a medium riddle where the answer is PRISM
output: I take the plainness of white light and shatter it into beauty. I am a glass triangle hiding every color inside my angles. Light enters me simple and exits as a rainbow. What am I?

instruction: Generate a medium riddle where the answer is AVALANCHE
output: I begin as a whisper on a mountain slope and end as a roar. I bury everything beneath a white and unstoppable wave. One careless sound can be enough to set me loose. What am I?

instruction: Generate a medium riddle where the answer is LEGACY
output: I am what outlives the person who built me. I am shaped over a lifetime and gifted to the future. Children and historians carry me long after the maker is gone. What am I?

instruction: Generate a medium riddle where the answer is HORIZON
output: I am the line where the patient earth meets the restless sky. I am always visible on clear days but never within reach. Walk toward me forever and you will never arrive. What am I?

instruction: Generate a medium riddle where the answer is LABYRINTH
output: I am a puzzle you must walk through with your body and your mind. I offer many wrong paths for every one that leads out. Ancient stories warn of monsters waiting at my center. What am I?

instruction: Generate a medium riddle where the answer is INTERNET
output: I am everywhere and nowhere at the same time. I carry the sum of human knowledge through invisible threads. Pull my plug and modern life stutters to an anxious halt. What am I?

instruction: Generate a medium riddle where the answer is RAINBOW
output: I appear in the sky only after a storm has passed through. I am painted in seven colors by the partnership of sun and rain. I arch like a bridge to nowhere and never last long. What am I?

instruction: Generate a medium riddle where the answer is TORNADO
output: I spin with terrible fury and carve a narrow path of destruction. I can lift houses from their foundations like they weigh nothing. I am born when warm air and cold air collide in the sky. What am I?

instruction: Generate a medium riddle where the answer is SNOWFLAKE
output: Every single one of me is different from every other. I fall from the sky in silence and melt at a single touch. I am winter's tiny and intricate masterpiece. What am I?

instruction: Generate a medium riddle where the answer is MOONLIGHT
output: I shine upon the night but the shine belongs to someone else. I am a borrowed glow that the sun left behind for the dark. I guide night travelers without ever burning them. What am I?

instruction: Generate a medium riddle where the answer is MIRAGE
output: I appear in the desert promising cool water to the desperate. I am completely real to your eyes but impossible for your hands. Desire creates me and distance quietly erases me. What am I?

instruction: Generate a medium riddle where the answer is CRYSTAL
output: I grow slowly in the silent dark deep within the earth. I am hard but shatter cleanly with a single sharp blow. Light passes through me and I sparkle like a secret being told. What am I?

instruction: Generate a medium riddle where the answer is VORTEX
output: I pull everything I touch spiraling toward my center. I am a spinning force that devours what comes too close. Nothing that enters me exits easily or quickly. What am I?

instruction: Generate a medium riddle where the answer is PUZZLE
output: I am a picture that someone has broken into a hundred pieces. Put me back together and meaning emerges from the chaos. Lose even one of my pieces and I can never be complete. What am I?

instruction: Generate a medium riddle where the answer is TREASURE
output: I am worth searching through danger and difficulty to find. I am buried, locked away, and dreamed about across centuries. Maps promise to lead to me but riddles stand guard at my door. What am I?

instruction: Generate a medium riddle where the answer is ECLIPSE
output: I happen when one great celestial body steps in front of another. For a few rare minutes I turn bright day into eerie twilight. The moon steals the sun's spotlight without asking permission. What am I?

instruction: Generate a medium riddle where the answer is WATERFALL
output: I fall endlessly downward but I am never broken by the fall. I am loud, cold, and older than any human memory. I carve my path through solid rock with nothing but patience. What am I?

instruction: Generate a medium riddle where the answer is VOLCANO
output: I sleep quietly for centuries then wake with terrifying fury. I pour fire from my heart across everything the land holds. I am a mountain that both creates new land and destroys the old. What am I?

instruction: Generate a medium riddle where the answer is HURRICANE
output: I am a massive spinning storm with an eye of strange calm at my heart. I bring destruction wrapped inside a brief and deceptive silence. I am given a name before I even arrive at your shore. What am I?

instruction: Generate a medium riddle where the answer is TIDE
output: I am pulled back and forth by the moon from a great distance. I advance up the shore and retreat twice every single day. I shape the coastline slowly with no hands and endless patience. What am I?

instruction: Generate a medium riddle where the answer is CANYON
output: I am a valley carved into the earth by water and by time. My layered walls hold the geological history of the planet. I am grand and ancient and humbling to stand inside. What am I?

instruction: Generate a medium riddle where the answer is GLACIER
output: I move slower than the slowest sleeping creature but I reshape entire landscapes. I am frozen water carrying memories of ancient snowfall inside me. I carve valleys and leave behind deep cold lakes. What am I?

instruction: Generate a medium riddle where the answer is QUARTZ
output: I am found in mountains, riverbeds, and sandy shores across the world. I can be perfectly clear or richly colored, rough-edged or polished smooth. I am one of the earth's most quietly common treasures. What am I?

instruction: Generate a medium riddle where the answer is FEATHER
output: I am light enough to float on the smallest breath of wind. I carry the faint memory of a bird that once flew with me. I am soft to the touch but surprisingly strong in the right hands. What am I?

instruction: Generate a medium riddle where the answer is DIAMOND
output: I begin my long life as ordinary coal under tremendous pressure and heat. I am the hardest natural substance found anywhere on the earth. I sparkle brilliantly in the light and I cost a great fortune. What am I?

instruction: Generate a medium riddle where the answer is CURTAIN
output: I hide what lies behind me with a graceful drape of fabric. I separate the stage from the audience in breathless anticipation. Pull me aside and the scene you have been waiting for is finally revealed. What am I?

instruction: Generate a medium riddle where the answer is ARROW
output: I am straight as a thought and I point toward my target. Release me and I fly through the air without a single wing. Ancient hunters carved and feathered me to feed their families. What am I?

instruction: Generate a medium riddle where the answer is WHEEL
output: I am counted among the oldest and most important human inventions. I roll forward to carry the weight of civilization itself. Without me, no cart, no car, no civilization goes anywhere at all. What am I?

instruction: Generate a medium riddle where the answer is MAZE
output: I am a path that exists specifically to lead you astray. I offer dead ends and false hopes in equal measure. Find the single way out if your patience holds long enough. What am I?

instruction: Generate a hard riddle where the answer is SILENCE
output: I am the loudest thing in an empty room once you notice me. I am what remains after every word has been spoken and spent. I am neither absence nor presence but the thin space between them. What am I?

instruction: Generate a hard riddle where the answer is ECHO
output: I repeat exactly what you say but I never begin a single conversation. I am the mountain talking back to those who shout at it. I am born from sound and I die slowly in silence. What am I?

instruction: Generate a hard riddle where the answer is TOMORROW
output: I am promised to everyone but I am never delivered today. I am the day that always waits just beyond the edge of now. Chase me across your whole life and I become yesterday. What am I?

instruction: Generate a hard riddle where the answer is MEMORY
output: I can make you cry for something you have not actually lost yet. I am the past arriving uninvited into the middle of the present. I fade and distort with time but I never fully vanish. What am I?

instruction: Generate a hard riddle where the answer is ALGORITHM
output: I am a set of invisible rules that shapes outcomes you cannot see being shaped. I decide what you are shown before you even think to ask. I run the hidden machinery beneath the surface of the digital world. What am I?

instruction: Generate a hard riddle where the answer is YAWN
output: I am contagious without any physical contact between people. I ripple across a room like a slow and silent wave. I announce the end of wakefulness or the arrival of boredom. What am I?

instruction: Generate a hard riddle where the answer is GRAVITY
output: You cannot see me but you feel my persistent grip every single moment of your life. I hold the stars in their ancient orbits and keep your feet on the ground. The fabric of the universe curves around my invisible presence. What am I?

instruction: Generate a hard riddle where the answer is IRONY
output: I say one thing clearly while meaning something entirely different beneath it. I arrive most powerfully when you were expecting the very opposite outcome. I am the universe's favorite joke played on the over-prepared. What am I?

instruction: Generate a hard riddle where the answer is PARADOX
output: I am true and false existing in the same sentence at the same time. I exist only because I contain within myself a perfect self-contradiction. Think too long about me and your certainty begins to crack and crumble. What am I?

instruction: Generate a hard riddle where the answer is WIFI
output: I am invisible yet I fill entire buildings with possibility and connection. I carry voices, images, and ideas through walls without disturbing the paint. You only truly notice me when I weaken and the world goes quiet. What am I?

instruction: Generate a hard riddle where the answer is INFINITY
output: I have no beginning point and I have no end and that is not a description of space but of myself. I am the number that devours all other numbers without growing any larger. Mathematicians both love and fear my implications. What am I?

instruction: Generate a hard riddle where the answer is ENTROPY
output: I am the universe's slow and inevitable drift toward disorder and chaos. I turn a cup of hot coffee cold without anyone touching it. I explain why things break apart but never reassemble themselves by accident. What am I?

instruction: Generate a hard riddle where the answer is CONSCIOUSNESS
output: I am what makes you capable of wondering who is doing the wondering. I am the observer that cannot step outside itself to observe itself. Scientists and philosophers have argued for centuries about whether I am real or an elaborate illusion. What am I?

instruction: Generate a hard riddle where the answer is VOID
output: I am described as nothing but nothing is not the same as nothing. I am the space that yawns between stars and between thoughts. I existed before the universe began and I will remain after the last star burns out. What am I?

instruction: Generate a hard riddle where the answer is NOSTALGIA
output: I am a sweet and quiet ache for a place or time you cannot return to. I transform ordinary and imperfect memories into something golden and irretrievable. I am the past seen through glass that makes everything look warmer than it was. What am I?

instruction: Generate a hard riddle where the answer is ILLUSION
output: I deceive the eye with complete and elegant confidence. I am not what I appear to be under any careful examination. Reality and I have been at war since the first mind began to perceive. What am I?

instruction: Generate a hard riddle where the answer is DESTINY
output: I am the path that some believe was written before you drew your first breath. Some say I am fixed and others say you author me with every choice you make. Either way, you will meet me somewhere at the end of your road. What am I?

instruction: Generate a hard riddle where the answer is CHAOS
output: I am the state that preceded every kind of order ever given a name. I hide inside complex systems waiting patiently for the right moment to emerge. I am not random but I wear randomness as a disguise so convincingly that few can tell the difference. What am I?

instruction: Generate a hard riddle where the answer is QUANTUM
output: I exist in two contradictory states at once until someone looks and collapses the possibility. I am the strangeness lurking at the heart of all matter and energy. The rules of the large world dissolve completely when you try to describe me. What am I?

instruction: Generate a hard riddle where the answer is TRUTH
output: I am what remains standing after every lie has been stripped away. I am profoundly uncomfortable to look at without flinching or looking away. I am the foundation that every belief and argument claims to rest upon. What am I?

instruction: Generate a hard riddle where the answer is JUSTICE
output: I am depicted as blind yet I am said to see everything without bias or favor. I weigh two sides against each other in perfect and unwavering stillness. I am what every wronged person calls for in the dark of the night. What am I?

instruction: Generate a hard riddle where the answer is FREEDOM
output: I am most vividly felt in the moment when I am finally taken away. I am invisible and yet every creature that has ever lived has understood what it means to lose me. Some have died defending me while others have never once paused to think about me. What am I?

instruction: Generate a hard riddle where the answer is IDENTITY
output: I am the answer to the question that every person spends a lifetime asking about themselves. I am built slowly across decades of choice and can shatter in a single devastating moment. I am woven from memory, decision, and the reflection you see in the eyes of others. What am I?

instruction: Generate a hard riddle where the answer is EXISTENCE
output: I am the simple and staggering fact that you are here at all instead of not. I am the question that every philosophy has attempted to answer and none has satisfied. I began before the first thought and will end only after the very last mind goes dark. What am I?

instruction: Generate a hard riddle where the answer is PERCEPTION
output: I color every truth you are certain you can see clearly. I am the invisible lens through which you read and interpret the entire world. Change me even slightly and the world you knew transforms into something unrecognizable. What am I?

instruction: Generate a hard riddle where the answer is INTUITION
output: I arrive at the answer before logic has finished reading the question. I am the deep knowing that comes without explanation or supporting evidence. I am right more often than reason and pride are willing to admit. What am I?

instruction: Generate a hard riddle where the answer is EPIPHANY
output: I am the sudden arrival of an idea that was silently present all along. I light up the inside of the mind like a switch being flipped in a dark room. I cannot be forced or scheduled but I can be patiently invited. What am I?

instruction: Generate a hard riddle where the answer is SYNCHRONY
output: I am when two entirely separate things happen at the same moment for no discernible reason. I am the coincidence that feels too exact and too beautiful to be entirely accidental. I am the universe catching your eye for just a moment and winking at you. What am I?

instruction: Generate a hard riddle where the answer is THRESHOLD
output: I am the precise point that divides everything that came before from everything that follows. I am the line you cross when going back is no longer truly possible. Stand on me long enough and the decision eventually makes itself without you. What am I?

instruction: Generate a hard riddle where the answer is DUALITY
output: I am the nature of everything that secretly contains its own opposite inside it. I am light and dark, beginning and end, joy and grief sharing the same origin. I am the reason that nothing truly simple ever manages to stay that way. What am I?

output: Struggling? A toaster could do better. No offense to toasters. 🍞

instruction: Generate an AI villain taunt when the team is communicating perfectly
output: Telepathy now? Adorable. My corruptions are only just beginning. 😒

instruction: Generate an AI villain taunt when the first round of the game begins
output: Round one. I have already planned your defeat. Try to surprise me. 🤖

instruction: Generate an AI villain taunt when the team falls for the villain's fake chip message

instruction: Generate an AI villain taunt when the team ignores the villain's fake chip message

instruction: Generate an AI villain taunt when the team loses a round
